x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents use notification actions to communicate with users and stakeholders. Misconfigured email settings prevent AI Agent notification actions from completing successfully.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Verify SMTP configuration via sys_email_account_list.do. Test outbound email delivery. Configure email templates for AI Agent-triggered notifications. Email is required for AI Agent stakeholder communication workflows.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cef
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[AI Agents use notification actions to communicate with users and stakeholders. Misconfigured email settings prevent AI Agent notification actions from completing successfully.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Email Notification Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_email_account");
gr.addQuery("active",true);
gr.addQuery("type","smtp-sender");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active SMTP email accounts",finding:n<1?"No active SMTP email accounts configured. AI Agents cannot send notifications without outbound email configuration.":""+n+" active SMTP accounts configured -- AI Agent notifications can be delivered."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006114</number>
<order>100</order>
<remediation_guidance>Verify SMTP configuration via sys_email_account_list.do. Test outbound email delivery. Configure email templates for AI Agent-triggered notifications. Email is required for AI Agent stakeholder communication workflows.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cef</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
